gist.headline: Watering the apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is an automated bot chore updating app health metrics (the 'greenhouse'). Depict the Monitor Robot (representing the bot) and Polly the Bee checking on plants (representing the apps) in a greenhouse setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and a tiny bee mascot with a clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and a tiny bee mascot with a clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
